job_description: We need an engineer to build ETL pipelines using Python, SQL, Airflow, dbt, and Spark.
Design dimensional models, maintain data warehouses, and optimize batch ingestion workflows.
Build machine learning models for text classification and deploy NLP inference services.
Develop RAG systems using embeddings, vector databases, and large language models.
Manage Kubernetes clusters, automate CI/CD pipelines, and improve deployment reliability.
Create automated release pipelines using Docker, Jenkins, and infrastructure monitoring tools.
Design scalable AWS infrastructure using EC2, S3, IAM, and cloud networking services.
Build secure Azure cloud environments and manage virtual networks, storage, and compute resources.
Monitor security events using SIEM tools and investigate suspicious network activity.
Perform vulnerability assessments, threat detection, and incident response across enterprise systems.
Develop backend applications using Java, REST APIs, databases, and software design patterns.
Build and maintain web applications using Python, Django, APIs, and relational databases.
